rows.label: qev090703_MSG0003
rows.name:
Correct. You're from the escort detail,
yes? Can you give me a status report?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090703_MSG0004
rows.name:
Dead... They're all dead.
Those things swarmed, and...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090703_MSG0005
rows.name:
The scientist survived... He hid
in a vehicle...further ahead...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090703_MSG0008
rows.name: We can't waste any more time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090703_MSG0009
rows.name:
Let's clear out the creatures ahead,
then evacuate our scientist.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090703_SEL0011
rows.name:
Say that you should help
the injured BLADE.

rows.label: qev090703_SEL0021
rows.name:
Take no more notice of the
wounded BLADE and move on.

rows.label: qev090703_MSG0010
rows.name:
You wish to prioritize a nameless grunt
over the life of an important scientist?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090703_MSG0012
rows.name:
Besides, that man is a professional. He'll
die happy knowing his client is safe.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090703_MSG0013
rows.name:
I'm glad to see you're a rational thinker.
The two of us'll work well together.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090703_MSG0014
rows.name:
Now follow me. We'll move
quickly but cautiously.[ST:wait ]
